encryption_details.key_storage: Stored encrypted at .data 0x4a90e0 (14 bytes: c2 cd 95 d6 d1 fa ce 96 dc fa 97 95 97 91). Recovered at runtime by _recover_key() based on PID parity: if (pid*(pid+1))&1 then key[i] = ~enc[i], else key[i] = enc[i] XOR 0xa5. The XOR-0xA5 path yields the actual key 'gh0st_k3y_2024'. Decrypted key cached at 0x4aac10 with _key_ready flag at 0x4aac20.

_self_modify / _sm_check: self-modifying code with marker check
_opaque_true / _opaque_false: opaque predicates to obfuscate control flow
_check_marker / _check_os: integrity/environment checks

Junk instructions like 'xchg %bx,%bx', 'lea (%rsp),%rsp', 'push %rax; pop %rax' inserted in anti-debug routines
PID-dependent key obfuscation (pid parity selects between NOT and XOR-0xA5)
Statically linked glibc to hide imports
RC4-encrypted string table at 0x4a9100 to defeat strings-based analysis
